name: DataProcessing
comment: Three encoding variants (Immediate, RegImmShift, RegRegShift) share the same 16-opcode ALU table. Step lists are identical across variants — only the op2 operand resolution differs.

formats.name: DataProcessing_RegRegShift
formats.comment: cccc 000 oooo s nnnn dddd SSSS 0 tt 1 mmmm  (Rm shifted by Rs)

formats.name: DataProcessing_RegImmShift
formats.comment: cccc 000 oooo s nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (Rm shifted by 5-bit immediate)

formats.name: DataProcessing_Immediate
formats.comment: cccc 001 oooo s nnnn dddd rrrr iiiiiiii (8-bit imm rotated by 2*rrrr)
